settings.title: Terminal Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize brand visual elements and primary color systems
settings.store_name_desc: This updates the main business text moniker displayed on headers and invoices.
settings.logo_desc: PNG, JPG, or SVG. Maximum file size 2MB. Logo renders in standard headers.
settings.infinite_spectrum_desc: Select any hex shade from the color spectrum box.
settings.languages_desc: Set your preferred interface language. This affects menus, buttons, and layouts.
